description.value:
Requirements Your mouth is exposed

Effect You breathe a @Template[cone|distance:30] of acid, dealing 1d6 acid damage for every 2 levels (@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d6[acid]|options:area-damage]) to all creatures in the area with a basic @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use Volosian Spit again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Volosian Spit]]{1d4 rounds}.
